content.text:
Deleting `demo-gimmicks-deep-dive.md` — the repo uses hyphens, not underscores.

[REDACTED]

`demo-gimmicks-deep-dive.md` is removed from the repo root.

There wasn’t a file named `demo_gimmicks-deep-dive.md` (underscore); the only match was `demo-gimmicks-deep-dive.md`, which is what was deleted. If you meant a different path, say where it lives and we can remove that too.
